title: U.S. Investigates Chinese AI Companies’ Access to Chips Amid Moonshot Accusations
summary: AI lab like Anthropic using U.S. chips, the Commerce Department could add the Chinese lab to its entity list, a BIS-enforced designation that restricts how foreign companies can access U.S. technology like advanced chips.
caption: output/2026-07-22/u-s-investigates-chinese-ai-companies-access-to-chips-amid-moonshot-ac.txt
